questions.question: Describe the structure of an X.509 certificate.
Explain the purpose of a self-signed certificate.
keyPoints: Signed by the same entity that issued it
Used for testing and development purposes

questions.question: Describe the process of verifying a certificate chain.
keyPoints: Start with the root CA certificate
Verify the intermediate CA certificate using the root CA certificate
Verify the end-entity certificate using the intermediate CA certificate

questions.question: What is the purpose of a certificate extension?
keyPoints: Additional information about the subject or issuer
Used to specify the intended use of the certificate

questions.question: Explain the differences between ASN.1 and Base64 encoding.
keyPoints: ASN.1 is a standard for encoding data in a binary format
Base64 is an encoding scheme used to represent binary data in a readable format
